20*%252520%252540param%252520callback%252520the%252520callback%252520to%252520add%25252C%252520must%252520be%252520non-null%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%25252F%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520public%252520void%252520registerAccessibilityButtonCallback(%252540NonNull%252520AccessibilityButtonCallback%252520callback)%252520%25257B%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520registerAccessibilityButtonCallback(callback%25252C%252520new%252520Handler(Looper.getMainLooper()))%25253B%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%25257D%25250A%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%25252F**%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%252520Registers%252520the%252520provided%252520%25257B%252540link%252520AccessibilityButtonCallback%25257D%252520for%252520interaction%252520and%252520state%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%252520change%252520callbacks%252520related%252520to%252520the%252520accessibility%252520button.%252520The%252520callback%252520will%252520occur%252520on%252520the%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%252520specified%252520%25257B%252540link%252520Handler%25257D's%252520thread%25252C%252520or%252520on%252520the%252520services's%252520main%252520thread%252520if%252520the%252520handler%252520is%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%252520%25257B%252540code%252520null%25257D.%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%252520%252540param%252520callback%252520the%252520callback%252520to%252520add%25252C%252520must%252520be%252520non-null%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%252520%252540param%252520handler%252520the%252520handler%252520on%252520which%252520the%252520callback%252520should%252520execute%25252C%252520must%252520be%252520non-null%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520%252520*%25252F%25250A%252520%252520%252520%252520public%252520void%252520registerAccessibilityButtonCallback(%252540NonNull%252520AccessibilityButtonCallback%252520callback%25252C%25250A%252520%252520%25 enable = true
ca-p12 =
